deptName: ช่างอากาศยาน
standardRef: EASA PART 66 MODULE 6. MATERIALS AND HARDWARE
learningOutcomes:
Understand, explain and apply knowledge about corrosion effect on aircraft structure,
aircraft pipes, Springs, Bearings, Transmissions, Control Cables, Electrical Cables and
Connectors with good attitude to work neatly, perform inspect corrossion of aircraft material
with good practical manner, be patience with work, a habit of working carefully and safety in
aircraft material work.
objectives:
1. Be able to understand the corrosion effect in aircraft, aircraft pipes, Springs, Bearings,
Transmissions, Control Cables, Electrical Cables and Connectors.
2. Be able to explain corrosion effect in aircraft, aircraft pipes, Springs, Bearings,
Transmissions, Control Cables, Electrical Cables and Connectors.
3. Have a good attitude to work neatly, be patience with work, a habit of working
carefully and safety.
4. Be able to apply knowledge corrosion effect in aircraft, aircraft pipes, Springs,
Bearings, Transmissions, Control Cables, Electrical Cables and Connectors in practice and
higher education.
competencies:
1. Describe and codify knowledge about the corrosion effect in aircraft structure, aircraft
pipes and union, Springs, Bearings, Transmissions, Control Cables, Electrical Cables and Connectors.
2. Perform inspection of corrosion effect in aircraft with a good practical manner.
3. Apply their knowledge of corrosion effect in aircraft structure, aircraft pipes and
union, Springs, Bearings, Transmissions, Control Cables, Electrical Cables and Connectors in
practical and higher education.
description:
To study and practice about Corrosion: Chemical fundamentals, Formation by galvanic
action process, microbiological and stress. Types of corrosion and identification, Causes of
corrosion, Material types, susceptibility to corrosion. Pipe and Union and Springs, Bearings,
Transmissions, Control Cables, Types of cables, End fittings, Turnbuckles and Compensation
devices as tension regulation, Pulleys and cable system components, Bowden cables and
Aircraft flexible control systems. There is also Hose, Pipes and Unions use to carry pneumatic
or fluid or both, Identification of types of rigid and flexible pipes and their connectors used in
aircraft including Electrical Cables and Connectors.
